raw_json: {"signals":[{"signal_kind":"potential_preference","object_kind":"device_preference","confidence":0.88,"matched_text":"I'm actually thinking of getting a smart plug for my floor lamp in the living room, so I can turn it on and off with my phone.","distilled_fact":"The speaker is thinking of getting a smart plug for the floor lamp in the living room so the speaker can turn it on and off with a phone."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"household_device_change","confidence":0.93,"matched_text":"I replaced the bulb in my bedside lamp with an LED one about three weeks ago, and it's been a game-changer.","distilled_fact":"The speaker replaced the bulb in the bedside lamp with an LED bulb about three weeks ago."},{"signal_kind":"potential_preference","object_kind":"household_device_opinion","confidence":0.79,"matched_text":"I replaced the bulb in my bedside lamp with an LED one about three weeks ago, and it's been a game-changer.","distilled_fact":"The speaker considers the LED bulb in the bedside lamp to be a game-changer."}]}
